Title: Rustic Metal Drawer Slides/Brackets for Furniture DIY
Description:
Elevate your furniture projects with these handcrafted rustic metal drawer slides and brackets. Designed for easy installation, these hardware pieces add a vintage, industrial, or farmhouse aesthetic to any cabinet, dresser, or chest of drawers.

  • Material Quality: Crafted from durable, sturdy metal, ensuring reliable function and lasting strength over time.
  • Rustic Design: Features a distressed or aged black finish that perfectly complements farmhouse, industrial, and rustic décor styles.
  • Versatile Use: Ideal for mounting drawers, cabinet doors, or creating unique display storage solutions. Perfect for DIY enthusiasts and professional cabinet makers.
  • Installation: Designed with pre-drilled holes for simple, secure mounting into most common wood furniture pieces.

These brackets are a perfect blend of function and style, transforming basic storage into a piece of art. They make excellent gifts for DIY lovers, homeowners, or restoration enthusiasts.
